entities.name: Genre Shift
entities.context: Fundamental societal change needed, not mere restoration of old patterns

entities.name: Fractal Contribution
entities.context: Meaning exists at all scales; family/community level is where meaning always lived, not a consolation prize

entities.name: Minimum Viable Existence
entities.context: The old state that should not simply be restored; transformation is needed instead

entities.name: High-trust Cooperation
entities.context: Belief that cooperative behavior remains rational despite societal challenges

entities.name: Ainulindalë
entities.context: Tolkien metaphor for finding one's part in the great song without being discordant

entities.name: Stability-seekers
entities.context: Those who seek stability; a legitimate expression of humanity

entities.name: Explorers
entities.context: Sailors to unseen shores; another legitimate expression of humanity alongside stability-seekers

relationships.context: Both form V's worldview on societal meaning and contribution
Genre shift rejects simple restoration of MVE in favor of deeper transformation
Ainulindalë metaphor illustrates how individuals find their part in contribution
Both are legitimate expressions of humanity; neither is superior
Restoring meta-belief that high-trust cooperation remains rational
